pages:
MediSight Data Platform Inc.
Quarterly Snapshot | Clinical & Operational Data Platform
Period: Q4 2024
MediSight Data Platform Inc. ("MediSight") operates a cloud-based data platform for hospital systems, aggregating clinical, claims,
and operational data. Contracts are multi-year with pricing tied to data volume and number of facilities.
Key Metrics - Q4 2024
Metric Q4 2024
Recognized Revenue 6.1M
Gross Margin 75%
Contracted ARR (end of period) 24.5M
ARR Growth (YoY) 38%
ARR from Existing Accounts 82%
Avg. Remaining Contract Term 3.1 years
Total Headcount 108
Operating Observations
Recognized revenue for Q4 2024 totalled 6.1M with Gross Margin of 75%. Contracted ARR reached 24.5M, driven primarily by
expansion within existing health systems. MediSight onboarded one new hospital network during the quarter, requiring incremental
implementation and customer success headcount. Management continues to target gross margin in the mid- to high-70s for the
near term.
No material customer churn was observed. Management flagged active late-stage conversations with European hospital groups; no
probability-weighted pipeline figures were shared.
Other Financial Information
- Capitalized software development costs: 0.4M in Q4 2024.
- No material write-downs of previously capitalized software.
- Evaluation of a second data centre region for international expansion is ongoing; no capital commitments made.
(1) Contracted ARR represents annualized value of signed, active contracts.
(2) ARR Growth (YoY) is computed versus the equivalent period of the prior fiscal year.
(3) Gross Margin excludes implementation and customer success costs.
(4) Figures are management estimates; unaudited.
